eligible.summary: Great news! You meet all the requirements to vote in this election.
next_steps: Check your name on the electoral roll at nvsp.in
If not registered, file Form 6 online
Find your polling booth 1 week before election day
Bring your ID on election day and vote!
eligible.caveat: If your name is not on the roll, you may not be able to vote in this election. Check immediately at nvsp.in or call 1950.

eligible_no_voter_id.summary: You're eligible to vote! But you need to complete your registration first.
documents_needed: Proof of address (utility bill, rental agreement, passport, Aadhaar)
Proof of identity (PAN, Aadhaar, Passport, Driving License)
next_steps: Go to nvsp.in and click 'Register as a Voter'
Choose 'New Voter Registration' and fill your details
Upload proof of address and identity
Wait 7-10 days for approval
Check your status using your reference number
eligible_no_voter_id.caveat: Register as soon as possible. Check nvsp.in for current registration deadlines or call 1950.

ineligible_age.summary: You're not quite eligible yet, but you will be soon! Keep an eye on when you turn 18.
next_steps: You'll be eligible to vote when you turn 18
Mark the date in your calendar
Visit nvsp.in after you turn 18 to register
In the meantime, learn about candidates, issues, and the voting process on this app
ineligible_age.caveat: You can start preparing now by understanding how voting works. Check back after you turn 18 to register.

ineligible_citizenship.summary: To vote in Indian elections, you must be an Indian citizen.
next_steps: If you're an NRI (Non-Resident Indian), visit eci.gov.in for overseas voting options
If you're a foreign national, you cannot vote in Indian elections
If you're in the process of getting Indian citizenship, check your status with the immigration office
ineligible_citizenship.caveat: Verify your citizenship status. For overseas voting, visit eci.gov.in or call 1950.

ineligible_residence.summary: You need to live at your current address for at least 6 months to be eligible.
next_steps: You'll be eligible once you've completed 6 months at your current address
Check the calendar — when will that be?
After 6 months, return here to re-check your eligibility
In the meantime, you can still learn about the voting process on this app
ineligible_residence.caveat: You must have lived at your current address for 6 full months before you can vote from there. Verify the date and check back.
